creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
It is not possible to build graphics/gimp* due to a the
inability to build graphics/libopenraw. This failure with
graphics/libopenraw also affects no less that 50 other ports.
The problem appears to be the way in which it (libopenraw)
handles the existence of devel/boost* libs. There are already
at least 2 other PR's against graphics/libopenraw. It might
be time to mark graphics/libopenraw BROKEN, as it doesn't
appear be maintained.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris

Fix: 

Find a maintainer for graphics/libopenraw
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build graphics/gimp*
